message:
feat(storage): add tiered retention policy system

Implement flexible retention tiers that match events by severity,
event type prefix, and handled status. Tiers are evaluated in order
with first-match-wins semantics, falling back to global retention_days
when no tier matches.

Default tiers: critical (90 days), warning (30 days), info (7 days).

RetentionTier struct with:
- name: human-readable tier label
- retention_days: per-tier retention period
- severities: case-insensitive severity filter list
- event_types: prefix-matched event type filter list
- handled: optional handled/unhandled status filter

StorageConfig extensions:
- retention_tiers field with serde default
- resolve_retention_days() method implementing tier matching
- Hot-reload change detection for retention_tiers

Includes 13 unit tests covering: default tier creation, severity
matching (case-insensitive), event type prefix matching, handled/
unhandled filtering, first-match-wins ordering, fallback behavior,
TOML serialization roundtrip, and hot reload detection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
